privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic configuration modifications. All expected metadata values (MathTools.activity directory path, 'Math Tools' name, 'org.laptop.MathTools' bundle ID, 'math-tools' icon property, 'A dedicated calculator for math class.' summary, and 'math-tools.svg' icon filename) have been verified to exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and the verification logic in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
